nasb.text: So the priests and the Levites consecrated themselves to bring up the ark of the Lord God of Israel.

esv.text: So the priests and the Levites consecrated themselves to bring up the ark of the Lord, the God of Israel.

cnv.text: 於是祭司和利未人自潔，好把以色列的　神耶和華的約櫃抬上來。

ccb.text: 于是祭司和利未人就洁净自己，好将以色列的上帝耶和华的约柜抬上来。
